title: Alternative Take on the Adams and other popular aspects of Rebuild Undergoing cleanup 27 07 2019
display_title: Alternative Take on the Adams and other popular aspects of Rebuild Undergoing cleanup 27 07 2019
wikitext:
[]: Alternative Take on the Adams and other popular aspects of Rebuild (Undergoing cleanup 27/07/2019)             Quote Post by Ollow » Thu Jul 25, 2019 12:51 pm UNDERGOING CLEANUP Sorry if it's a mess at the moment but I'm working on it as this has been moved to its own thread recently. --- So hey, before I go back to posting more about Kaworu I figured it'd be better to address this post that I couldn't do in that thread first. I actually did spend a week re-watching Rebuild multiple times and going through articles online, including the ones in Japanese about various Eva topics, so I hope this is enough to keep up with the years of speculation behind this impressive undertaking. Seriously, kudos to you Reichu. There's a lot going on here and I can only imagine the work it took to put it all here. Table of Contents Part 1: Are the Adams in any of the Evas or in the Key of Nebuchadnezzar? -- Mark 06 -- Unit 01 -- Eva 13 -- Key of Nebuchadnezzar Part 2: If not, then where or what are the Adams? -- What the Adams are -- The Past -- The Future -- "Adams Survivor" and "Adams Vessel" -- Where the Adams are Part 3: It's a cycle, not a loop! (will be updated) --- Part 1: Are the Adams in any of the Evas or in the Key of Nebuchadnezzar? A response to the ideas in The Four Adams are Eva-01, Mark.06, Eva-13, and the Key of Nebuchadnezzar and the Identities of the Adams . Mark 06 Rather than an Adams, I believe Mark 06 is made out of the original Adam's body. The base body is incredibly similar to that of Lilith. They're both also masked in a similar fashion. The base for its body was found on the moon. In the old TV series, it was said that Lilith is of the black moon while Adam is of the white moon. It's not a stretch to say that the moon could actually be the white moon of Adam. This Adam was only dug out in the years after the Second Impact when the Adams appeared. To corroborate this, the red streak on the moon would have been on top of the dirt already covering Adam, assuming the streak is from the Second Impact as in the rejected storyboard. quick reference to rejected storyboard excerpt  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Adams, Children, and the Nature of the Cycle             Quote Post by Ollow » Fri Jul 26, 2019 1:56 am Previous post: Part 1: Are the Adams in any of the Evas or in the Key of Nebuchadnezzar? Part 2: If not, then where or what are the Adams? version 0.1 version changes  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Alternative Take on the Adams             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 26, 2019 10:16 am Hey, Ollow ! I've split your posts out of here since you're doing your own separate analysis which is very, very different from my own and it just seems to make more sense to give these posts their own thread to breath in. Feel free to change the title to whatever you like. (I can't do anything about the part at the front that's specifically addressing my thread, though. You would have to recreate that manually, if you don't mind doing so.)

[]: Re: Alternative Take on the Adams             Quote Post by Ollow » Sat Jul 27, 2019 2:57 am Reichu wrote: Hey, Ollow ! I've split your posts out of here since you're doing your own separate analysis which is very, very different from my own and it just seems to make more sense to give these posts their own thread to breath in. Feel free to change the title to whatever you like. (I can't do anything about the part at the front that's specifically addressing my thread, though. You would have to recreate that manually, if you don't mind doing so.)

[]: Re: Alternative Take on the Adams and other popular aspects of Rebuild (Undergoing cleanup 27/07/2019)             Quote Post by Zoop » Sun Jul 28, 2019 6:48 am All top notch stuff, enjoyed reading it. I think I have a little addition for So basically, Angels (excluding Lilith) = Fruit of Life = body Lilim = Fruit of Knowledge = brain
